title: Rename device - only one earbud is connected, rename is not possible
scenario: Device rename option missing from Device Settings > General when only one earbud is connected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure only one earbud (left or right) is connected to the phone.
3. Tap on the connected device name to enter Device Settings.
expected: The "Rename Device" option should be available in Device Settings > General regardless of whether one or both earbuds are connected.
